name: Federal Fuel Tax Credit

eligibility.description: Available to taxpayers who use fuel for off-highway business purposes (e.g., stationary engines, forklifts, construction equipment) or for farming purposes. The credit is generally claimed on Form 4136.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a refundable tax credit for the federal excise taxes paid on gasoline and special fuels used for non-taxable purposes, such as farming, off-highway business use, or certain bus services.
